blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,206 ft. Looking ahead, 36 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
